heroHeadline: PLA Hits 19-Sortie Peak on March 29 — Highest of Late-March Spike; AIT Director Backs 5% GDP Defense
heroSubtitle: 19 PLA sorties March 29 (13 crossing median line, 4 sectors) mark highest daily count of late-March escalation; AIT Director Greene endorses NT$1.25T special budget and 5% GDP target; Taiwan army drills on Matsu; Type 055 destroyers established in Eastern Theater; special defense budget deadlock continues
footerNote: Data sourced from Taiwan MND, US DoD, DSCA, CSIS ChinaPower, Global Taiwan Institute, AIT, Reuters, AP, Bloomberg, NPR, Taipei Times, Focus Taiwan, Nikkei Asia, ANI News, and institutional analyses. All claims reflect multi-pole sourcing across Western, East Asian, and international media.
